'''鈭歡-sh-s''' ('''kagashas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:maderise|maderise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-sh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:maderise|maderise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-sh-s
|-
! Lemma
| kagashas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigashas|thigashas]] || [[word:jigashas|jigashas]] || [[word:shigashas|shigashas]] || [[word:kigashas|kigashas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugashas|thuthugashas]] || [[word:jujugashas|jujugashas]] || [[word:shushugashas|shushugashas]] || [[word:kukugashas|kukugashas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugashas|thugashas]] || [[word:jugashas|jugashas]] || [[word:shugashas|shugashas]] || [[word:kugashas|kugashas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugashas|thugashas]] || [[word:jugashas|jugashas]] || [[word:shugashas|shugashas]] || [[word:kugashas|kugashas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegashas|thegashas]] || [[word:jegashas|jegashas]] || [[word:shegashas|shegashas]] || [[word:kegashas|kegashas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogashas|thothogashas]] || [[word:jojogashas|jojogashas]] || [[word:shoshogashas|shoshogashas]] || [[word:kokogashas|kokogashas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogashas|thogashas]] || [[word:jogashas|jogashas]] || [[word:shogashas|shogashas]] || [[word:kogashas|kogashas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogashas|thogashas]] || [[word:jogashas|jogashas]] || [[word:shogashas|shogashas]] || [[word:kogashas|kogashas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gashas|gashas]] || [[word:gashas|gashas]] || [[word:gashas|gashas]] || [[word:gashas|gashas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gashas|gashas]] || [[word:gashas|gashas]] || [[word:gashas|gashas]] || [[word:gashas|gashas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gashas|gashas]] || [[word:gashas|gashas]] || [[word:gashas|gashas]] || [[word:gashas|gashas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gashas|gashas]] || [[word:gashas|gashas]] || [[word:gashas|gashas]] || [[word:gashas|gashas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙gashas|th忙gashas]] || [[word:j忙gashas|j忙gashas]] || [[word:sh忙gashas|sh忙gashas]] || [[word:k忙gashas|k忙gashas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagashas|thathagashas]] || [[word:jajagashas|jajagashas]] || [[word:shashagashas|shashagashas]] || [[word:kakagashas|kakagashas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagashas|thagashas]] || [[word:jagashas|jagashas]] || [[word:shagashas|shagashas]] || [[word:kagashas|kagashas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagashas|thagashas]] || [[word:jagashas|jagashas]] || [[word:shagashas|shagashas]] || [[word:kagashas|kagashas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagashas|shagashas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagashas|goshagashas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagashas|gokishagashas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagashasn眉|shagashasn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagashasnkn眉|goshagashasnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagashasn眉|gokishagashasn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagashassh毛|shagashassh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagashasnksh毛|goshagashasnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagashassh毛|gokishagashassh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagashasro|shagashasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagashasnkro|goshagashasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagashasro|gokishagashasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagashasmu|shagashasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagashasnkmu|goshagashasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagashasmu|gokishagashasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagashassher|shagashassher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagashasnksher|goshagashasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagashassher|gokishagashassher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagashasng|shagashasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagashasnkng|goshagashasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagashasng|gokishagashasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagashasya|shagashasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagashasnkya|goshagashasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagashasya|gokishagashasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagashasyam|shagashasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagashasnkyam|goshagashasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagashasyam|gokishagashasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagashasn眉sh毛|shagashasn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagashasnkn眉sh毛|goshagashasnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagashasn眉sh毛|gokishagashasn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagashasn眉ro|shagashasn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagashasnkn眉ro|goshagashasnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagashasn眉ro|gokishagashasn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagashasn眉mu|shagashasn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagashasnkn眉mu|goshagashasnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagashasn眉mu|gokishagashasn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagashassh毛n眉|shagashassh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagashasnksh毛n眉|goshagashasnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagashassh毛n眉|gokishagashassh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagashassh毛ro|shagashassh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagashasnksh毛ro|goshagashasnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagashassh毛ro|gokishagashassh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagashassh毛mu|shagashassh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagashasnksh毛mu|goshagashasnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagashassh毛mu|gokishagashassh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagashasron眉|shagashasron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagashasnkron眉|goshagashasnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagashasron眉|gokishagashasron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagashasrosh毛|shagashasrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagashasnkrosh毛|goshagashasnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagashasrosh毛|gokishagashasrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagashasromu|shagashasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagashasnkromu|goshagashasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagashasromu|gokishagashasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagashasmun眉|shagashasmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagashasnkmun眉|goshagashasnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagashasmun眉|gokishagashasmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagashasmush毛|shagashasmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagashasnkmush毛|goshagashasnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagashasmush毛|gokishagashasmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagashasmuro|shagashasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagashasnkmuro|goshagashasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagashasmuro|gokishagashasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|d414c41}}
